accountHolderCode.description: The code of the account holder.

amount.description: The amount to be debited from the account holder's bank account.

bankAccountUUID.description: The Adyen-generated unique alphanumeric identifier (UUID) of the account holder's bank account.

description.description:
A description of the direct debit. Maximum length: 35 characters.

Allowed characters: **a-z**, **A-Z**, **0-9**, and special characters **/?:().,'+ ";**.

splits.description: Contains instructions on how to split the funds between the accounts in your platform. The request must have at least one split item.
